basic_details.job_title: IIT Roorkee General Duty Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee (IIT Roorkee) Recruitment 2026: Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee is conducting a Walk-in Interview for 2 General Duty Medical Officer posts. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for eligible candidates to attend the interview directly without any prior online application.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS degree (including 01-year Internship and Registration with Medical Council (State/NMC))
qualification.details: MBBS degree (including 01-year Internship and Registration with Medical Council (State/NMC)). Desirable: at least 01-year experience in any Govt./Private hospital.

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee General Duty Medical Officer Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Roorkee Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. IIT Roorkee General Duty Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for IIT Roorkee General Duty Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee General Duty Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for IIT Roorkee?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the General Duty Medical Officer position at IIT Roorkee is scheduled for 08-07-2026. Candidates should ensure they arrive at the venue with all necessary documents on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the General Duty Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification is an MBBS degree, which must include a 01-year internship and valid registration with a Medical Council (State/NMC). Experience is desirable but not mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the General Duty Medical Officer position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the post of General Duty Medical Officer at the Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for this contractual position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 80,000/- per month for the contractual period.

faq.question: Q5. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, internship completion certificate, Medical Council registration, and experience certificates (if any), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the General Duty Medical Officer role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification. Candidates are assessed based on their qualifications and performance during the interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee, Roorkee, Uttarakhand. The exact venue details will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: No, this is a contractual position. The job type is specified as Contractual, meaning it is for a fixed duration as per the terms of the appointment.
